title: Wire claim_validator domain checks to pack domain.yaml
problem: Ticket-120 loaded domain.yaml and exposed allowed_domains_for_pack(), but claim_validator still does not use pack primary/overlap domains when validating candidate claim domain fields. NM-5 completion should drive at least one validation path from pack identity metadata.
acceptance_criteria: validate_candidate_claim rejects domain values outside pack allowed_domains_for_pack when pack loads.
Creativity pack allows creativity and overlap domains from domain.yaml.
Temp-pack unit test proves different primary_domains changes acceptance/rejection.
Golden tests and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No multi-pack orchestration beyond creativity MVP path.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
rollback_plan: Revert claim_validator domain allowlist wiring; restore implicit creativity-only checks.
